query: Given a ground sample distance (GSD) of 0.2621 meters per pixel, estimate the length (in meters) of the longest ship present in the imagery. Assume that all ships are docked horizontally (aligned parallel to the x-axis). Round your final estimate to the nearest whole number.
final_answer: The estimated length of the longest ship in the image is approximately 293 meters.

evaluation.question: Is the estimated length of the longest ship within the acceptable range of 264 to 322 meters?
